name: Herbed Potato Patties
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Round OR Long White Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine potatoes and 3 cups water in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, until tender, about 15 minutes.
2. Drain potatoes, allowing them to cool to touch. Peel the potatoes and mash the pulp and cottage cheese in a medium bowl.
3. Add parsley, sage, rosemary, thyme, salt, garlic powder, grated onion, and egg whites. Stir until well combined.
4. Place wheat germ in a shallow dish.
5. Drop about 1/3 cup of potato mixture into the wheat germ on each side, forming patties. Gently coat the patties with wheat germ.
6. Place the patties on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
7. Pat the patties to a thickness of about 1/2 inch.
8. Repeat the procedure with the remaining potato mixture to make an additional 7 patties.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes. Turn patties over and bake an additional 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve immediately.
